bugs.title: UpdateTrip returns INTERNAL instead of NOT_FOUND for non-existent trip
bugs.description: UpdateTrip with a valid UUID that does not exist returns code 'internal' with message 'an internal error occurred' instead of 'not_found'. This leaks an internal error to the client and masks the root cause.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Call UpdateTrip with id=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099 and title='Updated'
bugs.actual: internal error code with generic message

bugs.title: ExtractBookingField returns UNAVAILABLE instead of NOT_FOUND for non-existent booking
bugs.description: ExtractBookingField with a valid UUID that does not match any booking returns code 'unavailable' with message 'AI service encountered an error'. The handler is passing the non-existent booking to the AI layer instead of checking for existence first, resulting in a misleading error.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Call ExtractBookingField with booking_id=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 and question='What is the check-in time?'
bugs.actual: unavailable error code: 'AI service encountered an error'
bugs.api_command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/toqui.v1.BookingService/ExtractBookingField -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer TOKEN' -d '{"booking_id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","question":"What is the check-in time?"}'

bugs.title: GetChatHistory returns INTERNAL instead of NOT_FOUND or empty result for non-existent session
bugs.description: GetChatHistory with valid UUIDs for trip_id and session_id that do not exist returns code 'internal' with message 'an internal error occurred'. This should return not_found or an empty messages array.
bugs.actual: internal error code with generic message

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural adversarial test — not a user-experience evaluation. All 10 prescribed test cases passed: validation interceptor correctly rejects malformed IDs, empty/oversized strings; trip state machine enforces valid transitions; empty collections return success not errors; delete is idempotent. Three bugs found in bonus edge-case testing: UpdateTrip and GetChatHistory leak INTERNAL errors for non-existent resources, and ExtractBookingField returns UNAVAILABLE instead of NOT_FOUND.
